{{Infobox location
| name = Center for Arcane Research
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Center for Arcane Research]] is a smooth, rounded [[pyramid]] of glass and [[Lutoch Terelle]]'s destination.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Center for Arcane Research]] has three layers of magical wards.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Glass Ring Projector]] is assigned to the [[Center for Arcane Research]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
